summary: Iteration 17 - Redeem Code Flow Testing. All 12 features tested. Backend: 9/9 tests passed (verify-claim, claim endpoints). Frontend: All UI flows working (redeem page renders, auto-verifies, shows order info, Sign In/Create Account buttons, Claim button when logged in, success state with Go to My Library). Fixed frontend error handling for response body stream issues.
critical_code_review_comments: RedeemCode.js: Fixed error handling in handleVerify and handleClaim to gracefully handle 'body stream already read' errors by falling back to status code-based error messages
redeem_routes.py: Correctly implements verify-claim (GET) and claim (POST) endpoints with proper email matching, already-claimed detection, and download_links linking
email_service.py: Order confirmation template includes 'Redeem Your Purchase' section with link to /redeem?code={order_id}
seed_data_creation: None - used existing orders SF-2026-CZ5SB (admin, claimed), SF-2026-WVEE9 (different email), SF-2026-P7DXY (admin, claimed during test)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Redeem code flow fully tested and working. Orders SF-2026-CZ5SB and SF-2026-P7DXY are now claimed by admin user. SF-2026-WVEE9 belongs to kingdomlivingproject2020@gmail.com and cannot be claimed by admin. Frontend error handling was improved to handle browser-level response body consumption issues.

verify_claim_valid_order.details: GET /api/orders/verify-claim?code=ORDER_NUMBER returns order info with masked_email, items, claimable status

verify_claim_invalid_order.details: GET /api/orders/verify-claim with invalid code returns 404 with 'Order not found' message

claim_without_auth.details: POST /api/orders/claim without auth returns 401 with 'Please log in' message

claim_with_matching_email.details: POST /api/orders/claim with valid auth and matching email claims order successfully, links download_links

claim_duplicate.details: POST /api/orders/claim duplicate returns 'already claimed' message with already_claimed: true

claim_wrong_email.details: POST /api/orders/claim with wrong email user returns 403 with 'different email' message

redeem_page_renders.details: /redeem page renders with code from URL query param and auto-verifies

redeem_page_order_info.details: /redeem page shows order info card with items, masked email, Paid badge

redeem_page_not_logged_in.details: /redeem page shows Sign In / Create Account buttons when not logged in

redeem_page_logged_in.details: /redeem page after login shows 'Claim This Order' button and user email

redeem_page_claim_success.details: /redeem page claim success shows green confirmation card with 'Content Claimed!' and 'Go to My Library' button

email_template_redeem_section.details: Email template includes 'Redeem Your Purchase' section with link to /redeem?code=ORDER_ID (verified in email_service.py lines 225-233)
